title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
